name: charly-ollama
description: Self-contained skills for running the ollama LLM-server image. Pair with charly-jupyter to expose Ollama models to Jupyter notebooks via the jupyter MCP.

interface.longDescription: Self-contained skills for running the ollama LLM-server image. Pair with charly-jupyter to expose Ollama models to Jupyter notebooks via the jupyter MCP.
defaultPrompt: Use OpenCharly Ollama for this OpenCharly task.
